Him Saral App for Parents & Students

  • School & PTM Notifications

    Admin/Teacher can upload Notifications in this section. Parents will get push notification on their mobile regarding school notifications & PTM.

  • Online Fee Payment

    Parents can make the online fee payment through Mobile App or Him Saral Portal using the integrated secure payment gateway.

  • Daily Homework & Attendance

    Teacher can upload the Homework & Attendance to the assigned classes to them by Admin. Students/Parents can check their own Homework/Homework.

  • Exam-Result Updates

    Teacher can update the Marks of their assigned subject in respective exams. Parents/Students can see download their Report Cards for the selected Exams.

Him Saral Teacher App Teachers Dairy

  • Time-Table

    Common Time-Table visible to all users, uploaded by Admin.

  • Activity Updates

    Common Activities visible to all users, uploaded by Admin or Class Teachers.

  • Communication/Feedback

    Parents can communicate with School Admin or Class Teacher of their son/daughter and can submit their feedback to the school Admin.

  • School Toppers & Gallery

    School Toppers & Gallery section, maintained by Admin or the authorized users by Admin. This section visible to all users.

Attractive Features

Information Technology offers a wide opportunity to rethink the way an Institution is managed and the educational services delivered.
Below are few points which makes Him Saral different from other School ERPs.

Cost Effective

Him Saral works efficiently on any computer and hence no/least hardware upgrade is required.

Technological EDGE

Him Saral is built with the latest technology, which is generally used by high end web applications.

User Friendly

Him Saral is browser-based application developed for Educational Institutions. This makes its use as easy as browsing the net.

Security

Need based reporting. Minimization of Fraud. 100 % Virus proof. Accessibility controlled by multi layered access.

Flexibility

Can run with SQL and MS SQL application. Can integrate all & existing database.

Accessibility

Multi & Inter-unit utilization. Group financial records can be created. Single window multiple functions. Minimize manual error.

why choose us

We have a dedicated 24x7 Technical Support Team for Remote & Onsite Training of School Users
to save the Time & Money of School Administrations for managing their School.

Support
Training
Save Time
Best Price

Him Saral – Product Descriptions

Keeping in mind our large Clients database from urban to rural areas throughout India, Internet connectivity at some remote areas and other
Technology-wise requirements, we have designed our product Him Saral as Desktop/Cloud/Mobile based.

Him Saral Desktop Based System

Him Saral Cloud Based System

Him Saral Mobile App
Installation Desktop based Him Saral (School Software) need to install on Client system. Cloud based Him Saral is ready to use and support many features like Payment Gateway integration, Mobile App etc. Him Saral App has 24×7 access to the information from anywhere in the world. Being connected to the school via mobile means you’ll never miss out any crucial information.
Software Access Only School Admin or School Users have access to all the Modules of the Software. School Admin have access to all the Modules. Teachers, Parents & Students have also access to the Modules, assigned by Admin to them. Admin & Teacher can access/upload limited features of the Online Software. Parents/Students can view the information related to them only.

Our Customer Feedback

A customer talking about their experience related to our product with us is worth hundred times that
which we write or say about ourselves. A Satisfied customer is the best source of advertisement.

We are using the software and web services of this company from last 5 years. Too much satisfied with quick services. Especially the support team is very cooperative. The skill and team work of this company is really appreciable.

Kavita Attri

Principal, Jitender Veer Model Sr. Sec. School Sector 71, Mohali

Highly recommended company for software development, web development/designing with expert professional teams. Thanks for the great work!

Sonia Sharma

IT Head, Sant Isher Singh Public School, Phase 7, Mohali

We are using School Software of this company since 2006. Excellent services provided by them. Our school website has been designed by this company and we are too much satisfied by them. In the school field they are the best.

V. K. Joshi

Director, Alpine Public School Nalagarh, HP

I like the software. It is user-friendly, particularly the user-defined fields, which allow me to tailor queries to very specific needs. I would also like to add that I am always amazed.

Kamwal Singh

IT Head, Ghoman International Public School, Gurdaspur, Punjab

We have connected with the company since 2008. This company is exceptional! They are very quick to respond and always happy to help in any way possible. We are toom much satisfied with their services.

Urmila

Administrative, Ramanujam Royal Convent School, Darlaghat, HP

Him Saral, a product of HT Logics Private Limited, is an excellent school software for small schools which have low budget. I personally recommend this company for software development and web designing.

Lalit Mohan Sharma

Director, Nav Vibhor Public Sr. Sec. School, Mandi

We need much customized school software for our co-residential school. Our requirements are very unique. HTL Team did an excellent job by developing the desktop application as per our requirements. Also, their response time is very quick for any query done from our side.

Rajesh Kumar

Bursar Manager, Dalhousie Public School, Badhani, Pathankot, Punjab

I was much worried about - after implementation service and support in software, because of my previous experience. My initial interest was for my fee collection management.

Pawan Kumar Verma

Director, Sunrise Public School, Bhambla, Distt. Mandi, HP

Our school including all the 250 schools under Himachal Shiksha Samiti in Himachal Pradesh, using the Him Saral Software. Best School Software, we have ever used.

Sanjay Kumar Verma

IT Head, SVM Himrashmi, Shimla, HP

Our school has been using the Him Saral School Management Software developed by HT Logics Private Limited, Mohali since the inception of the school. We are satisfied with the prompt service...

Praveen Kumar Dhiman

Chairman, St. Xaviers Residential School, Mandi, HP

Software very easy to use. User-friendly software for principal, teachers, administration staff, parents & students. We thanks Team HTL for developing such an easy application.

Arvind Katoch

Chairman, Bhagwati Public School, Jalari, Nadaun, Distt. Hamirpur, HP

I am really happy with your service, it is superb, When I have a question they answer it at once, they have more than an outstanding customer service. When it comes to creating professional, attractive, and effective websites, there is only one platform where one can land safely that is HT LOGICS PVT. LTD.

Suman Kumar Thakur

Chairman, Sanchetna Public Sr. Sec. School, Awahdevi, Hamirpur, HP

We are Happy with the service provided by Him Tech Logics. It took little more time as they promised, but it’s Ok as they did good job. In future I will contact them if I need any other software.

Dilbag Singh

Director, Oyster Public Sr. Sec. School, Baldwara, Mandi, HP

We are using School Software of this company since 2006. Excellent services provided by them. Our school website has been designed by this company and we are too much satisfied by them. In the school field they are the best.

Shabnam Chauhan

Principal, New Gyan Dham Public School Nalagarh, HP

New relationship with H T Logics but in comparison to others, these people are so much more pro-active & service oriented, besides the fact that they, of course, know their job. I appreciate their good services.

Vinay Kumar Sharma

Manager, Parmarth International School, Baijnath, Distt. Kangra, HP

activities by streamlining work processes and enabling institutions go paperless; then you are just one email away.
